title: Training/paid assistance for creating an application and understanding the functionalities of Monday
excerpt:

posts.author: TomDel (Tom Delépine)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I am reaching out to you as an apprentice working for a young company specialized in Monday.com. As the sole developer so far, I have primarily used webhooks, the API, and have already become familiar with Monday’s SDK. However, client requests are becoming more demanding, now requiring the creation of mini-applications. This involves using Monday’s application interface, which I find challenging to understand, along with its various functionalities and settings.

I have already utilized widget creation, but that is the extent of my knowledge. Hence, I am seeking someone who uses Monday’s application development section to provide short-term training (of course, this will be compensated). It is crucial that the person speaks fluent French since English remains a challenge for me. You can contact me here.

Thank you in advance for your assistance and responses.

Best regards,
Tom Delépine
